subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hello Bob,

Thank you for following up — it's great to hear from you after the conference. We'd be glad to set up a formal meeting to explore a potential partnership.

Here are some available slots:

• April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Please let us know your preference, and we'll get a calendar invite out.

As for the request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — we're not able to share internal contact information externally. That said, we'll make sure the right people are looped in as our conversation develops.

Looking forward to it!

Best regards
